name: Mike Koran - Primary Residential Mortgage Inc
description_short: Mike Koran at Primary Residential Mortgage offers home purchase and refinance loans across California, Washington, Nevada, Texas, Florida, and Ohio, with 20+ years experience and $1B+ funded volume.
description_long:
Mike Koran founded Primary Residential Mortgage, Inc. as a mortgage lending practice built on 20+ years of industry experience and over $1 billion in funded loan volume. Operating as a San Francisco-based loan officer, Koran has developed a reputation for serving homebuyers and homeowners who were previously underserved or rejected by traditional banks. His background in operations and leadership informs his approach to loan origination beyond rate-quoting.

The company offers home purchase loans, refinance solutions, and pre-approval services across six states (California, Washington, Nevada, Texas, Florida, and Ohio). A key specialty is California's Dream For All down payment assistance program, which provides qualified first-time, first-generation homebuyers up to 20% of purchase price (max $150,000) as a shared appreciation loan with zero interest and no monthly payments—only repayment required upon sale or refinance. The company emphasizes problem-solving for complex loan scenarios and tight escrow closings.

Koran's competitive differentiation centers on responsiveness, transparency, and willingness to work with non-traditional borrowers. Client testimonials highlight his team's step-by-step guidance, proactive communication with seller agents to demonstrate financial strength, and sustained relationships (one client worked with him for nearly 10 years). The company maintains a 5.0-star rating across 150+ combined Google and Yelp reviews. His marketing positions him as an advocate who "treats your loan like it actually matters" rather than a transactional lender.

The primary caveat is that this is a single loan officer's practice within a larger company, not a nationwide mortgage platform. Services are geographically limited to six states. Like all mortgage lenders, approval depends on creditworthiness, income verification, and property appraisal. The website lacks specific rate quotes, loan term details, or fee transparency—standard practice in mortgage lending but requires direct contact for pricing.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 20+ years of experience with $1+ billion in funded loan volume demonstrates substantial track record
Specializes in California Dream For All down payment assistance (up to $150K, zero interest, no monthly payments)
5.0-star rating based on 150+ verified Google and Yelp reviews
Willing to work with underserved borrowers and those rejected by traditional banks
Offers tight escrow closings and proactively communicates with seller agents
Provides step-by-step guidance through complex mortgage scenarios
Long-term client relationships documented (10+ years with repeat customers)
cons: Single loan officer practice—limited scalability and availability compared to larger mortgage platforms
Serves only 6 states (CA, WA, NV, TX, FL, OH), excluding most of the country
No specific rate quotes, fees, or loan terms published on website—requires direct contact for pricing
Dream For All program is lottery-based and limited to California; not available to all borrowers
Testimonials are self-selected; no independent third-party review data beyond review platforms
best_for: California first-time homebuyers interested in Dream For All down payment assistance
Borrowers with non-traditional credit or income profiles rejected by major banks
Homeowners seeking refinance with personalized, relationship-based service in CA, WA, NV, TX, FL, or OH
Real estate investors and home buyers prioritizing responsive, detail-oriented loan management
diagnosis: Mike Koran is best suited for California homebuyers pursuing down payment assistance or borrowers in six select states who need personalized attention and have been declined by mainstream lenders. Primary caveat: as a single-officer practice, availability may be limited and approval depends on standard mortgage underwriting criteria (credit, income, property appraisal); no advantage in pricing or speed versus larger lenders.
services: California Dream For All down payment assistance program access
Shared appreciation loan structuring (zero-interest deferred payment loans)
Complex scenario loan solutions for underserved borrowers
Coordination with real estate agents and sellers
Multi-state lending (CA, WA, NV, TX, FL, OH)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: Mike Koran at Primary Residential Mortgage offers home purchase and refinance loans across six states with 20+ years experience.
